final:
module top_module(
    input  clk,
    input  rst,
    output foo);reg foo_i;

assign foo = foo_i;

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
    if (rst == 1'b1) begin
        foo_i <= 0;
    end
    else begin
        foo_i <= !foo_i; 
    end


endmodule
